title: Knapsack Problem Variations
shortDescription: Solve variations of the classic 0/1 knapsack problem, such as when profits are binary (1 or 2) or when weights are fractional (up to 2 decimal places) but items cannot be partially selected. Apply dynamic programming techniques while handling the specific constraints of each variation.

Were You Asked This?
Knapsack Problem Variations

Solve variations of the classic 0/1 knapsack problem, such as when profits are binary (1 or 2) or when weights are fractional (up to 2 decimal places) but items cannot be partially selected. Apply dynamic programming techniques while handling the specific constraints of each variation.

Asked at:

Google
